name: Berserk
additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that nullifies your armor and natural armor on use. While active, your M1s nullify your opponent's armor, and your criticals gain +10% PEN. This procs effects that only activate if you or your opponent had no armor durability. Lasts 20 seconds, halved to 10 if you do not meet the Talent requirements.
desc: One with nothing to lose has everything to gain. Succumb to burning rage within and enter Berserk State.
